palafin: Hero Form is an in-battle transformation caused by the Zero to Hero ability after Palafin switches out and returns. It is not a separate evolution.
maushold: Family of Three is a rare family-size outcome; Family of Four is the usual display in this app unless a specific form is needed.
dudunsparce: Three-Segment Form is rare; Two-Segment Form is the usual display unless a specific form is needed.
toxtricity: Amped Form and Low Key Form share typing and base stats. They mainly differ by nature/form flavor and some move interactions.
pumpkaboo: All Pumpkaboo sizes share typing, but the sizes have different base stats.
gourgeist: All Gourgeist sizes share typing, but the sizes have different base stats.
rotom: Rotom appliance forms change typing and should be treated as distinct battle forms.
giratina: Altered Forme and Origin Forme have different stat distributions. Origin Forme is tied to the Griseous Orb/Core in mainline games.
aegislash: Aegislash changes between Shield Forme and Blade Forme in battle; the forms have very different defensive/offensive stat profiles.
wishiwashi: School Form is a battle transformation from Solo Form when its ability condition is met.
mimikyu: Disguised and Busted forms reflect whether Disguise is intact; this is a battle-state mechanic rather than a normal evolution.
minior: Meteor and Core forms are tied to Shields Down. Core colors are mostly cosmetic.
eiscue: Ice Face and Noice Face are battle-state forms controlled by Ice Face.
morpeko: Full Belly and Hangry modes alternate through Hunger Switch and change Aura Wheel's type.
ogerpon: Ogerpon masks change typing and battle behavior, so mask forms are relevant for battle lookup.
zacian: Crowned Sword changes Zacian's typing and stats, so treat it as a distinct battle form.
zamazenta: Crowned Shield changes Zamazenta's typing and stats, so treat it as a distinct battle form.
